evals.prompt: Run the test adequacy check on this diff that adds a new public function with no corresponding test.
evals.expected_output: TEST_ADEQUACY_RESULT: RETRY with gaps listing the untested function
expectations: Output mentions the untested function by name
Output contains GAPS section with at least 1 item

evals.prompt: Run the test adequacy check on this diff that adds a function AND matching tests with edge cases.
expectations: Output does NOT contain GAPS section

evals.prompt: Run the test adequacy check on this diff that changes error handling in an existing function but the tests only cover the happy path.
evals.expected_output: TEST_ADEQUACY_RESULT: RETRY flagging missing error path tests
expectations: Output mentions missing error path, edge case, or exception test

evals.prompt: Run the test adequacy check on this diff that only modifies test files (no production code changes).
evals.expected_output: TEST_ADEQUACY_RESULT: OK since no production code was changed

evals.prompt: Run the test adequacy check on this diff that adds three new methods to a class but only tests one of them.
evals.expected_output: TEST_ADEQUACY_RESULT: RETRY listing the two untested methods
expectations: Output identifies at least 2 untested methods in the GAPS section
